keyResults: Both members of minimal pair are U(1) oscillators (Prop 1.2)
Equal rest frequency T₁=T₂ (Thm 2.1, variational uniqueness in same geometry)
Charge conjugation Q₁+Q₂=0 (Thm 3.1)
Conjugate boundaries (Prop 4.1), dissolution operators (Cor 4.2)
Pair persistence with exact closure (Thm 5.1)
Charge conjugation operator C with C²=id (Prop 6.2)
Self-conjugate (Q=0) observers are own antiparticle (Prop 7.1)
Exhaustive 3-type classification: Passage (I), Fusion (II), Resonance (III)
Type I: phase-only exchange (for minimal observers; Prop 4.2)
Type II: merge into non-product space with dimension reduction
Type III: both survive + new irreducibly relational invariant
Decision tree is exhaustive and types are mutually exclusive (Thm 5.1)
Cases B, C, D reduce to dissolution or Case A (Props 2.1, 3.1)

corrections.summary: Rewrote exchange-phase derivation: replaced confused intermediate step (spurious π/2, 3π/2 phases) with direct Hom(Z₂,U(1))={+1,-1} argument

keyResults: π₁(SO(3)) = Z₂ → exactly two homotopy classes of observer loop (Prop 1.2)
Exchange ↔ 2π rotation via configuration space topology (Prop 2.1)
Integer spin → R(2π)=+1, half-integer → R(2π)=-1 (Prop 3.2)
Spin-statistics connection = identity map Z₂→Z₂ (Thm 3.3)
Structural Postulate S1: topological consistency (Laidlaw-DeWitt)
Anyons in d=2 from π₁=Z (Prop 5.1)
Only bosonic/fermionic in d=3 (Thm 6.1, DHR)
